actions.value:
If you are seeing 4 dots where your Total Balance is normally displayed, you may have accidentally tapped on it to hide your wallet balances. You can tap on these 4 dots, or on the little green eyeball above them, to unhide your balances.

 

Let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.

If you are seeing 4 dots where your Total Balance is normally displayed, you may have accidentally tapped on it to hide your wallet balances. You can tap on these 4 dots, or on the little green eyeball above them, to 'unhide' your balances.

Let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.
